docket_entries.description: TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR JUL-30-2026 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO IIONA JESUS YANEZ
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT GUHDE, KRISTEN MAILED TO RESPONDENT CAPP STREET HOA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-11-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPP STREET HOA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUHDE, KRISTEN $10,744.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,819.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,744.00 FILED BY CAPP STREET HOA AS TO DEFENDANT GUHDE, KRISTEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-11-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION RE: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPP STREET HOA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-28-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT GUHDE, KRISTEN
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ILONA YANEZ (HOA PRESIDENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPP STREET HOA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-11-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-11-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE JOHN TRUE. PLAINTIFF CAPP STREET HOA IS PRESENT, APPEARING IS ILONA YANEZ. DEFENDANT KRISTEN GUHDE IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. DEFENDANT MAKES AN ORAL MOTION RE: CONTINUANCE - THE COURT DENIES THE DEFENDANTS ORAL MOTION. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
